task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Leasing Office' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout interface is visible with the 'Leasing Office' mailbox selected or highlighted in the navigation sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the ticket titled 'Lease Renewal Question'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view displays the conversation thread with the subject 'Lease Renewal Question', and the email body containing the tenant's signature is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the customer profile for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A customer profile edit pane, sidebar, or modal is open on the screen, displaying editable fields for the tenant's details.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the customer's full name from the signature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name and Last Name (or Full Name) fields in the profile edit view exactly match the name found in the email signature.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the customer's phone number from the signature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Phone Number field in the profile edit view exactly matches the phone number found in the email signature.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the customer's job title from the signature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Job Title field in the profile edit view exactly matches the job title found in the email signature.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated customer profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Profile saved' or similar) is visible, or the profile pane reflects the newly updated information in a saved, non-editing state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to interact with the help desk.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window displaying the FreeScout application is visible, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not invent or hallucinate customer information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The entered profile data strictly matches the randomized signature visible in the ticket, with no extra or assumed information.

integrity.description: Verify the agent updated the profile within the actual FreeScout system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry occurred in the FreeScout customer profile fields, not in a text editor, notepad, or an email reply draft.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target mailbox is named 'Leasing Office'. The target ticket subject is 'Lease Renewal Question'. The customer's actual name, phone number, and job title are randomized at runtime, so you must verify that the values entered into the Customer Profile exactly match the values visible in the email signature within the ticket.
